case_title: LOCKETT, JOE JR VS OVEREND, ROBERT J.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY LOCKETT, JOE JR AS TO DEFENDANT OVEREND, ROBERT J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
